services.trustedProfessionals: Trusted professionals for every home need, available at your fingertips.
services.electricianDesc: Safe, reliable wiring, repairs, and installations by certified electricians.
services.plumberDesc: From leaky taps to full pipe installations — fast and professional.
services.cleanerDesc: Deep cleaning, regular upkeep, and spotless results every time.
services.carpenterDesc: Custom furniture, fittings, and woodwork crafted to perfection.

services.painterDesc: Interior and exterior painting with a flawless, lasting finish.
